title: Hall, Luke - Minister of State at the Department for Education - ACOBA Advice
body: "Mr Hall left his role at the Department for Education in July 2024.  Director of External Affairs and Stakeholder Engagement, National Grid Pld Mr Hall sought the Committee’s advice about taking up a role with National Grid Plc. The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in January 2025; and the appointment was taken up later that month. An accessible version of the letter is available here. "
